notes: Generated by specbridge-intake on 2026-06-09. Task: Independent review-agent report. Goal: Make the reviewer agent produce a structured, machine-validated review report instead of free text. Add a specbridge-review-report command that writes .specbridge/agent-reviews/<task>.review-agent-report.json with schema_version, task_id, run_id, verdict approve|block, findings list (id, severity info|minor|major|blocker, file, summary), reviewed_commit and created_at. Gate specbridge-handoff -Agent reviewer: it must fail when the report is missing, when verdict is block, or when any blocker finding exists; on success the reviewer output artifact references the report. Add validate-agent-review-reports.ps1 to smoke (schema, enums, run_id format, verdict/findings consistency). Show the reviewer verdict on Studio dashboard orchestration cards. Add CLI tests and keep smoke green.
